Object.id: DS Gulpord the Slime God M
DS Gulpord the Slime God S

Object.DisplayId: Creepy Weird Dark Spirit Mirror Image Monster
Creepy Weird Dark Spirit Mirror Image Monster

Object.Description: A key which opens an entrance to The Oryx Horde event.
A prism used for unprecedented velocity by the Cult of Admin.
The sacred blade of the Cult of Admin. Not to be trifled with.
Only advanced acolytes of the Cult of Admin may wield this weapon.
The Cult of Admin is always on the hunt for the unworthy.
A cursed dagger imbued with the infinite power of the Cult of Admin.
A godly weapon belonging to the Cult of Admin.
The finest katana, forged by the Cult of Admin. Its blade cuts anything.
This will make your Guild Hall larger and more attractive. Note that this will take effect after the Guild Hall is empty for a few minutes.
This will make your Guild Hall larger and more attractive. Note that this will take effect after the Guild Hall is empty for a few minutes.
This will make your Guild Hall larger and more attractive. Note that this will take effect after the Guild Hall is empty for a few minutes.
